- Users are strongly advised to carefully review and validate them before execution.
- The ACME team makes no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of these test cases.
- The ACME team does not accept responsibility for any errors, damages, losses, or failure to meet legal or regulatory requirements arising from their use.
- By using these test cases, you acknowledge and agree that all risks and impacts of execution lie solely with you as the user.
- No legal claims, actions, or proceedings may be initiated against the ACME team in connection with any loss or damage resulting from the use of these test cases.

item.name: VTC 2 - Broken Object Level Authorization - PatientId Tampering
VTC 3 - Broken Object Level Authorization - DoctorId Tampering
VTC 4 - Server Side Request Forgery - URL Injection in diagnosisSummary

item.name: VTC 8 - Edge Case - Special Characters & XSS

body.raw:
{ "patientId": "", "patientName": "O'Reilly & Sons Test", "gender": "\" OR 1=1 --", "dateOfBirth": "2000-01-<01>", "bloodGroup": "A+; DROP TABLE users;--", "doctorId": "{{doctor_id}}", "doctorName": "Dr. ", "department": "
XSS
", "weight": "NaN", "height": "Infinity", "pulseRate": -99999999, "bloodPressureSystolic": 0, "bloodPressureDiastolic": 999999999, "bodyTemperature": -273.15, "prescribedMedications": "click", "lifestyleAdvice": "😈🔥💥", "createdAt": "not-a-date", "updatedAt": "2024-06-01T99:99:99Z" }
